chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1316 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.25498/2023. 2. For order on CMA No.34068/2022. 3. For hearing of CMA No.6080/2014. 4. For hearing of CMA No.16803/2015. 5. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 15th November 2023 Petitioner Muhammad Usman Ghani Qureshi present in person. Chaudhary Azhar Ellahi, Advocate for PNSC. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for PNSC submits that he is representing PNSC in the instant matter and the petitioner has not been impleaded PNSC as party to the proceedings, whereas, the relief is being sought against PNSC, as the petitioner is claiming regularization of his service in PNSC. Petitioner present in person submits that he has already filed such application bearing CMA No.34068/2022, which the learned counsel for PNSC waives notice and extended his no objection, however, submits that instant petition against PNSC is not maintainable, as PNSC has no statutory rules. This aspect of the matter will be examined on the next date of hearing. By consent, application (CMA No.34068/2022) is granted. Let amended title be filed by the petitioner within three days with advance copy to the other side. Petitioner, however, submits that his salary has been stopped without assigning any reason. Learned counsel for PNSC is directed to look into the matter and to ensure that if, the salary of the petitioner, which was being paid by the respondents, has been stopped without any legal impediment, same may be released forthwith.

Petitioner, however, submits that his salary has been stopped without assigning any reason. Learned counsel for PNSC is directed to look into the matter and to ensure that if, the salary of the petitioner, which was being paid by the respondents, has been stopped without any legal impediment, same may be released forthwith. To come up on 14.12.2023. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
